description: Catalog of P31_* environment variables (names and semantics only — never store secret values here).

variables.name: P31_AUTO_PUSH
variables.description: Opt-in post-commit auto-push when hooks/autopush are enabled.

variables.name: P31_AUTO_PUSH_MAIN
variables.description: Allow auto-push on main/master when autopush is on.

variables.name: P31_CI_USE_PREFLIGHT
variables.description: GitHub Actions: call p31-ci with skip flags after preflight verify.

variables.name: P31_CLI_MINIMAL
variables.description: Reduce CLI banner/boot noise; used in verify:command-center smoke.

variables.name: P31_CMD_CENTER_HOST
variables.description: Bind address for local command center (default 127.0.0.1).

variables.name: P31_CMD_CENTER_LAN
variables.description: Bind command center for LAN / phone access (trusted networks only).

variables.name: P31_CMD_CENTER_NO_OPEN
variables.description: Do not auto-open browser when starting command center.

variables.name: P31_CMD_CENTER_PORT
variables.description: TCP port for command center (default 3131).

variables.name: P31_CMD_CENTER_SMOKE_PORT
variables.description: Ephemeral port for command-center server smoke tests.

variables.name: P31_SIMPLEX_ORIGIN
variables.description: SIMPLEX v7 Worker origin (no path, no trailing slash). Enables command-center /api/simplex-state proxy + live status strip.

variables.name: P31_CONVERGE_REPORT
variables.description: Override path for p31:converge JSON report.

variables.name: P31_CONVERGE_SKIP_CONSTANTS
variables.description: Skip verify-constants in converge wave.

variables.name: P31_CONVERGE_SKIP_PASSKEY
variables.description: Skip slow passkey wrangler dry-run (offline-friendly).

variables.name: P31_CONVERGE_STACK
variables.description: Enable verify-stack-links network probes in converge.

variables.name: P31_CONVERGE_VERIFY
variables.description: After parallel converge, run full root npm run verify.

variables.name: P31_DEMO_PORT
variables.description: Port for npm run demo static server (default 8080).

variables.name: P31_DOC_LIBRARY_E2E
variables.description: Scorecard gate in validate:full for doc-library Playwright e2e.

variables.name: P31_ECOSYSTEM_CONTINUE
variables.description: Run all ecosystem-deploy steps even if one fails; non-zero exit if any failed.

variables.name: P31_ECOSYSTEM_DEPLOY
variables.description: Must be exactly I_UNDERSTAND to execute ordered ecosystem deploy (destructive to remote config).

variables.name: P31_FULL_AUTO_GLASS
variables.description: Full automation: enable ecosystem glass.

variables.name: P31_FULL_AUTO_MESH
variables.description: Full automation: mesh probes (default on unless set to 0).

variables.name: P31_FULL_AUTO_REPORT
variables.description: Report output path for full automation.

variables.name: P31_FULL_AUTO_SKIP_ROOT_VERIFY
variables.description: Skip root verify in full automation.

variables.name: P31_GIT_REMOTE
variables.description: Remote name for pr.mjs (default origin).

variables.name: P31_GLASS_BUDGET_MS
variables.description: Override glass probe latency budget milliseconds.

variables.name: P31_GLASS_BUDGET_STRICT
variables.description: Exit 1 if any probe exceeds latency budget.

variables.name: P31_GLASS_REPORT
variables.description: JSON report path for ecosystem glass (default /tmp/p31_glass_report.json).

variables.name: P31_GLASS_STRICT
variables.description: Exit 1 if any ecosystem probe is down (non-auth/warn).

variables.name: P31_GLASS_TIMEOUT_MS
variables.description: Per-probe fetch timeout for ecosystem glass.

variables.name: P31_HOME_GITHUB
variables.description: Override home repo slug for git-ensure-remotes / pr tooling.

variables.name: P31_K4MARKET_SMOKE
variables.description: Scorecard gate in validate:full for k4market smoke.

variables.name: P31_K4MARKET_SMOKE_SKIP_ON_LAUNCH_FAIL
variables.description: Tolerate Playwright/WebGL launch failures in k4market smoke.

variables.name: P31_MESH_RETRY_GET
variables.description: Set to 0 to disable retry on mesh GET failures.

variables.name: P31_NO_AUTO_PUSH
variables.description: Skip post-commit auto-push for a commit.

variables.name: P31_OQE_ICOSA_E2E
variables.description: Scorecard gate in validate:full for OQE icosa e2e.

variables.name: P31_PHYSICS_LEARN_E2E
variables.description: Scorecard gate in validate:full for physics-learn e2e.

variables.name: P31_POLISH_SKIP_DOC_LIB
variables.description: Skip sync:doc-library:p31ca during npm run polish.

variables.name: P31_PR_IN_ANDROMEDA
variables.description: Force npm run pr to treat cwd as Andromeda repo.

variables.name: P31_PR_IN_HOME
variables.description: Force npm run pr to treat cwd as bonding-soup home.

variables.name: P31_PR_NO_AUTO_BRANCH
variables.description: On main/master, do not auto-create pr/<slug>-<sha> branch.

variables.name: P31_SKIP_MONETARY_HOOK
variables.description: Bypass pre-commit verify:monetary when committing payment/economy paths.

variables.name: P31_STYLE_ALIGN_GLOB
variables.description: Expand verify:style-alignment glob (e.g. all public HTML).

variables.name: P31_VFR_AUTO_GLASS
variables.description: VFR auto mode: run ecosystem glass.

variables.name: P31_VFR_FILE
variables.description: Override path for VFR config JSON.

variables.name: P31_VFR_FREQUENCY
variables.description: Manual VFR frequency Hz setpoint.

variables.name: P31_VFR_MODE
variables.description: Force VFR mode auto|manual from environment.

variables.name: P31_VFR_SKIP_PASSKEY
variables.description: Skip passkey wrangler dry-run in VFR resolve.

variables.name: P31_VFR_VOLTAGE
variables.description: Manual VFR voltage percent setpoint.

variables.name: P31_AUTOCLEAN_BASE
variables.description: Base ref for npm run automation:autoclean (default main).
